titleStmt.title: SII 18.388: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 388. (B.K. No. 83 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: North-west pillar in the navaraṅga in the Siddhēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record belonging to the 13th century A.D. is dated in the cyclic year Sarvadhāri, Kārtika Śu. 5, Thursday and states that, at the instance of Sarvādhikāri Vikadēvā-Paṇḍita, Chavuḍarasa, the Mahājanas, Najaras, Ubhayamārga-Tuḷuvas and other bodies, granted incomes on certain articles, for offerings to god Siddhanāthadēva (of Hāvēri).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī sarvadhārisaṁvacharada kārttika su 5 gu svasti śrīma(ṁ)nmahā
pradhānaṁ śrīmatu sarvvādhikāri śrī vikadēvapaṁḍitara nirū
padiṁ svasti śrī sanihata cavuḍarasaru mahājanaṁgaḷu nagara mu
ṁmuridaṁḍa vubhemārgga tuḷuvaru vubhe nānādēsi samasta halaru
gavuḍu praje mukhyavāgi sakala sā(ṁ)myavaṁtarū viṣaprahāri śrī
siddhanāthadēvara yamrutapaḍige biṭṭayāya bhūsa vidaḷaya
ḍake mārgādāya māmūle yettukatteyaṁnade hēṟiṁge
yadhāga yadhāga sīreyamaḷavake pāya pāyava biṭṭu barasi
da śāsana yī dharṁmmavanu mudre hasta mukhyavāgī mahājanaṁga
ḷū vubhemārga tuḷuvaru vubhe nānādēśi sakala sāmyavaṁ
tarū pālisuvaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 18.388 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
